svg.title: Memory architecture — order-triage AgentCore
svg.desc: The per-user memory plane: the Entra subject becomes actor_id; the AgentCore Runtime writes short-term events to AgentCore Memory every turn (async), an extraction pipeline populates three long-term strategies (SEMANTIC/facts, USER_PREFERENCE/preferences, SUMMARIZATION/summaries) keyed per actor_id, and each user turn retrieves and prepends a user_context block to the model prompt.
svg.text: Entra sub = actor_id partition key · async WRITE (CreateEvent -> short-term -> extract 3 strategies) vs per-turn READ (RetrieveMemoryRecords -> threshold -> <user_context>)
